languages.text: Поймав ваш взгляд, он подтверждает — именно на этом судне он сбежал с секретного объекта Амсанкт. Чартист был лишь прикрытием для операций Инквизиции, ходивший тайными маршрутами. Гибель судна не могла быть простой случайностью.

As your eyes meet, he confirms that this was the ship he used to flee the secret Amsanct facility. The Chartist Captain was merely a cover for Inquisition operations plying these secret routes. The demise of the ship could not have been a mere coincidence.
languages.original_text: Поймав ваш взгляд, он подтверждает — именно на этом судне он сбежал с секретного объекта Амсанкт. Чартист был лишь прикрытием для операций Инквизиции, ходивший тайными маршрутами. Гибель судна не могла быть простой случайностью.

traits.locale_text: As your eyes meet, he confirms that this was the ship he used to flee the secret Amsanct facility. The Chartist Captain was merely a cover for Inquisition operations plying these secret routes. The demise of the ship could not have been a mere coincidence.

As your eyes meet, he confirms that this was the ship he used to flee the secret Amsanct facility. The Chartist Captain was merely a cover for Inquisition operations plying these secret routes. The demise of the ship could not have been a mere coincidence.

languages.text: Cuando vuestros ojos se cruzan, te confirma que esta fue la nave que usó para escapar de la instalación secreta de Amsanct. Las acciones del capitán cartista eran una tapadera para las operaciones de la Inquisición en estas rutas secretas. La muerte de la nave no puede ser coincidencia.
languages.original_text: As your eyes meet, he confirms that this was the ship he used to flee the secret Amsanct facility. The Chartist Captain was merely a cover for Inquisition operations plying these secret routes. The demise of the ship could not have been a mere coincidence.

traits.locale_text: Cuando vuestros ojos se cruzan, te confirma que esta fue la nave que usó para escapar de la instalación secreta de Amsanct. Las acciones del capitán cartista eran una tapadera para las operaciones de la Inquisición en estas rutas secretas. La muerte de la nave no puede ser coincidencia.

languages.text: 当你与他四目相对时，他确认了你的猜测。这正是当年助他逃离阿姆桑克特秘密设施的那艘船。审判庭只是用宪章船长这一身份作掩护，好在这些秘密航线上开展行动。因此，这艘船的毁灭绝非巧合。
languages.original_text: As your eyes meet, he confirms that this was the ship he used to flee the secret Amsanct facility. The Chartist Captain was merely a cover for Inquisition operations plying these secret routes. The demise of the ship could not have been a mere coincidence.

traits.locale_text: 当你与他四目相对时，他确认了你的猜测。这正是当年助他逃离阿姆桑克特秘密设施的那艘船。审判庭只是用宪章船长这一身份作掩护，好在这些秘密航线上开展行动。因此，这艘船的毁灭绝非巧合。

languages.text: Als sich eure Augen treffen, bestätigt er, dass er mit diesem Schiff aus der geheimen Anlage auf Amsanct geflohen war. Der Chartistenkapitän war lediglich eine Tarnung für Operationen der Inquisition auf diesen geheimen Routen. Die Zerstörung des Schiffes konnte kein bloßer Zufall sein.
languages.original_text: As your eyes meet, he confirms that this was the ship he used to flee the secret Amsanct facility. The Chartist Captain was merely a cover for Inquisition operations plying these secret routes. The demise of the ship could not have been a mere coincidence.

traits.locale_text: Als sich eure Augen treffen, bestätigt er, dass er mit diesem Schiff aus der geheimen Anlage auf Amsanct geflohen war. Der Chartistenkapitän war lediglich eine Tarnung für Operationen der Inquisition auf diesen geheimen Routen. Die Zerstörung des Schiffes konnte kein bloßer Zufall sein.

languages.text: Lorsque vos regards se croisent, il confirme qu'il s'est servi de ce vaisseau pour fuir le complexe secret d'Amsanct. Le capitaine cartographe n'était qu'un moyen de couvrir les opérations de l'Inquisition qui se servaient de ces itinéraires secrets. La destruction du vaisseau ne peut pas être une simple coïncidence.
languages.original_text: As your eyes meet, he confirms that this was the ship he used to flee the secret Amsanct facility. The Chartist Captain was merely a cover for Inquisition operations plying these secret routes. The demise of the ship could not have been a mere coincidence.

traits.locale_text: Lorsque vos regards se croisent, il confirme qu'il s'est servi de ce vaisseau pour fuir le complexe secret d'Amsanct. Le capitaine cartographe n'était qu'un moyen de couvrir les opérations de l'Inquisition qui se servaient de ces itinéraires secrets. La destruction du vaisseau ne peut pas être une simple coïncidence.

languages.text: Gözleriniz buluştuğunda, gizli Amsanct tesisinden kaçmak için kullandığı geminin bu olduğunu doğruluyor. Haritacı Kaptan, sadece bu gizli rotalarda mekik dokuyan Engizisyon operasyonları için bir kılıftı. Geminin ölümü basit bir tesadüf olamazdı.
languages.original_text: As your eyes meet, he confirms that this was the ship he used to flee the secret Amsanct facility. The Chartist Captain was merely a cover for Inquisition operations plying these secret routes. The demise of the ship could not have been a mere coincidence.

traits.locale_text: Gözleriniz buluştuğunda, gizli Amsanct tesisinden kaçmak için kullandığı geminin bu olduğunu doğruluyor. Haritacı Kaptan, sadece bu gizli rotalarda mekik dokuyan Engizisyon operasyonları için bir kılıftı. Geminin ölümü basit bir tesadüf olamazdı.

languages.text: 彼の目と目が合った時、彼はこの船が秘密のアムサンクト施設から逃れるために使われた船だと確認する。チャリスト船長は、この秘密のルートを航行するインキジションの活動の偽装に過ぎなかった。この船の沈没は偶然ではなかった。
languages.original_text: As your eyes meet, he confirms that this was the ship he used to flee the secret Amsanct facility. The Chartist Captain was merely a cover for Inquisition operations plying these secret routes. The demise of the ship could not have been a mere coincidence.

traits.locale_text: 彼の目と目が合った時、彼はこの船が秘密のアムサンクト施設から逃れるために使われた船だと確認する。チャリスト船長は、この秘密のルートを航行するインキジションの活動の偽装に過ぎなかった。この船の沈没は偶然ではなかった。
